meta.summary: Purge_Dups 1.2.6 command-line runtime for detecting and removing haplotigs and contig overlaps from de novo genome assemblies using read-depth and self-alignment evidence.
meta.description: Purge_Dups 1.2.6 command-line runtime for detecting and removing haplotigs and contig overlaps from de novo genome assemblies using read-depth and self-alignment evidence.

test: purge_dups -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Program: purge_dups' >/dev/null && purge_dups -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Version: 1.2.5' >/dev/null && purge_dups -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: purge_dups' >/dev/null
for cmd in split_fa pbcstat calcuts get_seqs ngscstat; do "$cmd" -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null; done
pd_config.py --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'generate a configuration file in json format' >/dev/null && pd_config.py --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'pd_config.py 0.0.0' >/dev/null
ldd "$(command -v purge_dups)" | grep -F 'libz' >/dev/null && ldd "$(command -v pbcstat)" | grep -F 'libz' >/dev/null && test -s /opt/purge-dups/share/source-metadata/build.txt

tmp=/tmp/taf-purge-dups-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '>ctg1
AAAACCCCGGGGTTTTAAAACCCC
>ctg2
AAAAGGGGCCCCAAAAGGGGCCCC
' > asm.fa; split_fa asm.fa > asm.split.fa; grep -F '>ctg1:1-24' asm.split.fa >/dev/null; printf 'read1	24	0	24	+	ctg1	24	0	24	24	24	60
read2	24	0	24	+	ctg2	24	0	24	24	24	60
' > reads.paf; pbcstat reads.paf >/dev/null 2>&1; test -s PB.stat; test -s PB.base.cov; grep -F '>ctg1' PB.base.cov >/dev/null; printf '1	1
2	20
3	15
4	3
' > stat.in; calcuts -l 1 -m 2 -u 5 stat.in > cutoffs; awk "NR==1 && \$1==1 && \$6==5 {ok=1} END{exit ok?0:1}" cutoffs; purge_dups -T cutoffs -c PB.base.cov reads.paf > dups.bed 2> purge.log; grep -F '[M::main] finish sorting' purge.log >/dev/null; grep -F 'JUNK' dups.bed >/dev/null; get_seqs -p out dups.bed asm.fa; test -s out.hap.fa; grep -F '>hap_ctg1 JUNK' out.hap.fa >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: Purge_Dups
upstream.citation: Guan et al. 2020, Identifying and removing haplotypic duplication in primary genome assemblies
